description: Underwriter authority tiers — defines SA caps, loading caps, and specialty scopes per tier. Used by lib/uw-router.js to auto-assign referred cases.

junior.label: Junior Underwriter
junior.description: Handles clean counter-offer cases up to SA 25L. General specialty only.

senior.label: Senior Underwriter
senior.description: Handles moderate-complexity cases up to SA 1Cr. Multi-specialty.

chief.label: Chief Underwriter
chief.description: Handles high-complexity cases up to SA 5Cr. Full specialty scope.

medical_officer.label: Chief Medical Officer
medical_officer.description: Medical officer — no SA limit. Handles reinsurance referrals and complex medical cases.
